automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_CloudEnvironment
automationVariables.description: Azure Cloud environment (for example, AzureCloud, AzureChinaCloud, etc.)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_AuthenticationOption
automationVariables.description: Runbook authentication type (RunAsAccount or ManagedIdentity)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_StorageSink
automationVariables.description: The Azure Storage Account where data source exports are dumped to

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_ConsumptionOffsetDays
automationVariables.description: The offset (in days) for querying for consumption data

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_AdvisorFilter
automationVariables.description: The category filter to use for Azure Advisor (non-Cost) recommendations exports

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_ReferenceRegion
automationVariables.description: The Azure region used as a reference for getting details about Azure VM sizes available

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_SQLServerDatabase
automationVariables.description: The Azure SQL Database name for the ingestion control and recommendations tables

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_LogAnalyticsChunkSize
automationVariables.description: The size (in rows) for each chunk of Log Analytics ingestion request

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_StorageBlobsPageSize
automationVariables.description: The size (in blobs count) for each page of Storage Account container blob listing

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_SQLServerInsertSize
automationVariables.description: The size (in inserted lines) for each page of recommendations ingestion into the SQL Database

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_LogAnalyticsLogPrefix
automationVariables.description: The prefix for all Azure Optimization custom log tables in Log Analytics

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_LogAnalyticsWorkspaceName
automationVariables.description: The Log Analytics Workspace Name where optimization data will be ingested

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_LogAnalyticsWorkspaceRG
automationVariables.description: The resource group for the Log Analytics Workspace where optimization data will be ingested

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_LogAnalyticsWorkspaceSubId
automationVariables.description: The Azure subscription for the Log Analytics Workspace where optimization data will be ingested

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_LogAnalyticsWorkspaceTenantId
automationVariables.description: The Microsoft Entra tenant for the Log Analytics Workspace where optimization data will be ingested

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PriceSheetMeterCategories
automationVariables.description: Comma-separated meter categories to be included in the Price Sheet (remove variable to include all categories)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RetailPricesCurrencyCode
automationVariables.description: The currency code to be used for the retail prices exports (used for Reservations prices)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendAdvisorPeriodInDays
automationVariables.description: The period (in days) to look back for Advisor exported recommendations

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationLongDeallocatedVmsIntervalDays
automationVariables.description: The period (in days) for considering a VM long deallocated

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfPercentileCpu
automationVariables.description: The percentile to be used for processor metrics

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfPercentileMemory
automationVariables.description: The percentile to be used for memory metrics

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfPercentileNetwork
automationVariables.description: The percentile to be used for network metrics

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfPercentileDisk
automationVariables.description: The percentile to be used for disk metrics

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfPercentileSqlDtu
automationVariables.description: The percentile to be used for SQL DB DTU metrics

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdCpuPercentage
automationVariables.description: The processor usage percentage threshold above which the fit score is decreased or below which the instance is considered underutilized

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdMemoryPercentage
automationVariables.description: The memory usage percentage threshold above which the fit score is decreased or below which the instance is considered underutilized

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdCpuDegradedMaxPercentage
automationVariables.description: The maximum processor usage percentage threshold above which the instance is considered degraded

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdCpuDegradedAvgPercentage
automationVariables.description: The average processor usage percentage threshold above which the instance is considered degraded

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdMemoryDegradedPercentage
automationVariables.description: The memory usage percentage threshold above which the instance is considered degraded

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdNetworkMbps
automationVariables.description: The network usage threshold (in Mbps) above which the fit score is decreased

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdCpuShutdownPercentage
automationVariables.description: The processor usage percentage threshold above which the fit score is decreased (shutdown scenarios)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdMemoryShutdownPercentage
automationVariables.description: The memory usage percentage threshold above which the fit score is decreased (shutdown scenarios)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdNetworkShutdownMbps
automationVariables.description: The network usage threshold (in Mbps) above which the fit score is decreased (shutdown scenarios)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdDtuPercentage
automationVariables.description: The DTU usage percentage threshold below which a SQL Database instance is considered underutilized

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdDtuDegradedPercentage
automationVariables.description: The DTU usage percentage threshold above which a SQL Database instance is considered performance degraded

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdDiskIOPSPercentage
automationVariables.description: The IOPS usage percentage threshold below which a Disk is considered underutilized

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_PerfThresholdDiskMBsPercentage
automationVariables.description: The throughput (MBps) usage percentage threshold below which a Disk is considered underutilized

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateRightSizeMinFitScore
automationVariables.description: The minimum fit score for right-size remediation

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateRightSizeMinWeeksInARow
automationVariables.description: The minimum number of weeks in a row required for a right-size recommendation to be remediated

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationAdvisorCostRightSizeId
automationVariables.description: The Azure Advisor VM right-size recommendation ID

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateLongDeallocatedVMsMinFitScore
automationVariables.description: The minimum fit score for long-deallocated VM remediation

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateLongDeallocatedVMsMinWeeksInARow
automationVariables.description: The minimum number of weeks in a row required for a long-deallocated VM recommendation to be remediated

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationLongDeallocatedVMsId
automationVariables.description: The long deallocated VM recommendation ID

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateUnattachedDisksMinFitScore
automationVariables.description: The minimum fit score for unattached disk remediation

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateUnattachedDisksMinWeeksInARow
automationVariables.description: The minimum number of weeks in a row required for a unattached disk recommendation to be remediated

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RemediateUnattachedDisksAction
automationVariables.description: The action for the unattached disk recommendation to be remediated (Delete or Downsize)

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationUnattachedDisksId
automationVariables.description: The unattached disk recommendation ID

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationAADMinCredValidityDays
automationVariables.description: The minimum validity of an AAD Object credential in days

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationAADMaxCredValidityYears
automationVariables.description: The maximum validity of an AAD Object credential in years

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_AADObjectsFilter
automationVariables.description: The Microsoft Entra object types to export

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationRBACAssignmentsPercentageThreshold
automationVariables.description: The percentage threshold (used to trigger recommendations) for total RBAC assignments limits

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationResourceGroupsPerSubPercentageThreshold
automationVariables.description: The percentage threshold (used to trigger recommendations) for resource group count limits

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationVNetSubnetMaxUsedPercentageThreshold
automationVariables.description: The percentage threshold (used to trigger recommendations) for maximum subnet address space usage

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationVNetSubnetMinUsedPercentageThreshold
automationVariables.description: The percentage threshold (used to trigger recommendations) for minimum subnet address space usage

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationVNetSubnetEmptyMinAgeInDays
automationVariables.description: The minimum age (in days) for an empty subnet to trigger an NSG rule recommendation

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationsMaxAgeInDays
automationVariables.description: The maximum age (in days) for a recommendation to be kept in the SQL database

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationStorageAcountGrowthThresholdPercentage
automationVariables.description: The minimum Storage Account growth percentage required to flag Storage as not having a retention policy in place

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationStorageAcountGrowthMonthlyCostThreshold
automationVariables.description: The minimum monthly cost (in your EA/MCA currency) required to flag Storage as not having a retention policy in place

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_RecommendationStorageAcountGrowthLookbackDays
automationVariables.description: The lookback period (in days) for analyzing Storage Account growth

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_AWSEnabled
automationVariables.description: Whether AWS data collection is enabled

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_GCPEnabled
automationVariables.description: Whether GCP data collection is enabled

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_AwsExportsContainer
automationVariables.description: The Storage Account container used for AWS exports staging

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_GcpExportsContainer
automationVariables.description: The Storage Account container used for GCP exports staging

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_DistributorVmName
automationVariables.description: The name of the distributor VM used to run AWS/GCP collection scripts

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_DistributorVmRG
automationVariables.description: The resource group of the distributor VM

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_DistributorVmLocation
automationVariables.description: The location/region of the distributor VM

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_AWSScriptsPath
automationVariables.description: The local path on the distributor VM where AWS collection scripts are stored

automationVariables.name: AzureOptimization_GCPScriptsPath
automationVariables.description: The local path on the distributor VM where GCP collection scripts are stored

properties.description: The Azure SQL Server hostname for the ingestion control and recommendations tables
